chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1287 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 21-05-2025 Mr. Mir Ali Nawaz Khan, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. Abdul Qadeer Branch Manager, NBP Luqman Branch, Khairpur. **** Statements filed on behalf of respondent No.4 and SHO, P.S, B- section, Khairpur are taken on record. Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that for redressal of his grievance, the petitioner will avail alternate remedy, permissible under the law, before the appropriate forum. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
